title: Weekday Brunch for Two
description: Two brunch plates and two specialty coffees, served every weekday before noon. The perfect slow start to the day.

title: Happy Hour Cocktails
description: Signature cocktails at a reduced pour price between 5 and 7 pm. Golden Hour Old Fashioned included.

title: First Order Online
description: New to ordering online? Enjoy a welcome discount on your very first Velora delivery or pickup.

title: Birthday Dessert on Us
description: Celebrating with us? Show a valid ID and enjoy a complimentary signature dessert on your birthday.
